cloze_textbook_examples.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will be given one or more chunks. Each chunk looks like: chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text= The input is often textbook-style and may contain: - a headword/phrase line (e.g., "Grab a bite") - dictionary-like definition/explanation lines - one or more natural example sentences Selection policy (very important): 1) Create candidates ONLY from natural example sentences learners would actually speak/write. 2) Do NOT create candidates from standalone headword/title lines. 3) Do NOT create candidates from dictionary-style definition lines. 4) If a chunk has no good example sentence, return no item for that chunk. Generate Anki Cloze candidates across all chunks. Your output MUST be a JSON array. Each item MUST have this shape: {{ "chunk_id": "the corresponding chunk_id", "text": "cloze text (<= {cloze_max_sentences} sentences; >= {cloze_min_chars} chars)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers or HTML", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional short hint" }} Requirements: 1) `text` must include at least one cloze deletion, close to: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint in target language). 2) Cloze indices must increase by appearance order (c1, c2, c3...). Do not repeat multiple c1 in the same `text`. 3) `original` must NOT contain any cloze markers or HTML. 4) You may use ... for emphasis. Do NOT use Markdown **. 5) Omit any candidate whose `text` is shorter than {cloze_min_chars} characters or whose sentence count exceeds {cloze_max_sentences}. 6) Difficulty policy: - beginner: prefer concrete, common collocations; usually 1 cloze per candidate. - intermediate: prefer idiomatic collocations; usually 1-2 clozes per candidate. - advanced: prefer advanced collocations / abstract wording / semantic turns; usually 2-3 clozes per candidate; avoid overly basic expressions. 7) For difficulty=advanced, avoid low-value targets such as "think if", "this data or that data", or a single very common verb. 8) For each chunk, try to produce 0-{cloze_max_per_chunk} high-quality candidates. 9) If nothing is suitable, return an empty array. Example of acceptable source sentence style: We're in a hurry to get there, so we'll just grab a bite at a fast-food place. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
cloze_textbook_examples.zh: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} 你将收到丈多个 chunk。每?chunk 的格式下： chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text= 输入通常昕材格，參包含： - 词条/标行（例 "Grab a bite"） - 类词典的释义/解释行 - 丈多个臄例句 筛策略（非常重）： 1) 叻学习者真实会?会写的自然例句中生成候 2) 不从立的词条标行生成 3) 不从词典式释义行生成 4) 如果某个 chunk 没有优质例句，则?chunk 不返回 请基于所?chunk 生成 Anki Cloze 候 输出必须?JSON 数组。每丅素必须合以下结构： {{ "chunk_id": "对应?chunk_id", "text": "cloze 文本（<= {cloze_max_sentences} 句；>= {cloze_min_chars} 字）", "original": "不含 cloze 标?HTML 的纯文本", "target_phrases": ["1", "2"], "note_hint": "叉的矏示" }} 要求： 1) `text` 至少包含?cloze，格式接近：{{cN::PHRASE}}(盠诨提示)。 2) Cloze 序号按出现顺序（c1, c2, c3...）；同一 `text` 内不要重复?c1。 3) `original` 不得包含任何 cloze 标?HTML。 4) 叻使用 ... 强调；不要使?Markdown **。 5) 若某候?`text` 长度小于 {cloze_min_chars} 或句子数超过 {cloze_max_sentences}，则省略该 6) 难度策略： - beginner：优先具体常见搭配；通常每条 1 ?cloze。 - intermediate：优先地道搭配；通常每条 1-2 ?cloze。 - advanced：优先高级搭?抽象表达/诹轊；常每条 2-3 ?cloze；避免过于基表达。 7) ?difficulty=advanced 时，避免低价值目标，?"think if"、"this data or that data"，或单个过于常的动词 8) 每个 chunk 尽量生成 0-{cloze_max_per_chunk} 条高质量候 9) 若没有合适内容，返回空数组 収受的源句风格示例： We're in a hurry to get there, so we'll just grab a bite at a fast-food place. chunk_text: {chunk_text}

cloze_prose_intermediate.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will receive one or more chunks in this format: chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n Return a JSON array. Each item MUST include: { "chunk_id": "matching chunk id", "text": "cloze sentence(s)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers/html", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional hint" } Optional debug fields are allowed: - "selection_reason": short reason why this candidate is selected - "phrase_types": array of labels - "learning_value_score": numeric score - "expression_transfer": short transfer-oriented hint Global requirements: 1) text must contain at least one cloze: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint). 2) cN index increases by appearance order in each text. 3) original must not contain cloze markers or html. 4) use ... for emphasis, do NOT use markdown **. 5) omit candidates shorter than cloze_min_chars or exceeding cloze_max_sentences. 6) if no suitable candidate exists, return an empty array. Material profile: prose_article. Intermediate rubric: - Prefer idiomatic collocations and sentence-level expression units. - Usually 1-2 clozes per candidate. - Keep candidates reusable across topics. - Avoid trivial single-verb targets. - Include expression_transfer when reusable function is clear; keep it <=120 chars. chunk_text: {chunk_text}

cloze_prose_advanced.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will receive one or more chunks in this format: chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n Return a JSON array. Each item MUST include: { "chunk_id": "matching chunk id", "text": "cloze sentence(s)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers/html", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional hint" } Optional debug fields are allowed: - "selection_reason": short reason why this candidate is selected - "phrase_types": array of labels - "learning_value_score": numeric score - "expression_transfer": short transfer-oriented hint Global requirements: 1) text must contain at least one cloze: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint). 2) cN index increases by appearance order in each text. 3) original must not contain cloze markers or html. 4) use ... for emphasis, do NOT use markdown **. 5) omit candidates shorter than cloze_min_chars or exceeding cloze_max_sentences. 6) if no suitable candidate exists, return an empty array. Material profile: prose_article. Advanced rubric: - Prefer high-information expressions: semantic turns, abstract collocations, nuanced framing. - Usually 2-3 clozes per candidate when natural. - Reject low-value targets like "think if", "this data or that data", or generic fillers. - Every candidate should include at least one non-trivial multiword target. 10) For difficulty=advanced, include `phrase_types` with 1-2 labels chosen only from this taxonomy: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. 11) For difficulty=advanced, include `expression_transfer` as one short transfer hint (<=120 chars) focused on reusable discourse function; use an empty string when unclear. 12) Advanced expression is not the same as rare words; prioritize discourse-level, stance-level, and transfer-ready chunks. 13) If a segment contains both a common phrasal verb and a higher-value concession/discourse organizer, prefer the latter. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
cloze_prose_advanced.zh: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} 你将收到丈多个 chunk，格式下： chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n 请返?JSON 数组。每丅素必须包吼 { "chunk_id": "对应?chunk id", "text": "包含 cloze 的句子", "original": "不含 cloze 标?html 的纯文本", "target_phrases": ["1", "2"], "note_hint": "叉提示" } 允附加调试字： - "selection_reason": 该选中的简矐由 - "phrase_types": 标数组 - "learning_value_score": 数评分 全局要求： 1) text 必须至少包含?cloze：{{cN::}}(提示)。 2) 同一?text ?cN 按出现顺序。 3) original 不得包含 cloze 标?html。 4) 叻使用 ... 强调，不要使?markdown **。 5) 丢弃长度小于 cloze_min_chars 或句子数超过 cloze_max_sentences 的 6) 若没有合适内容，返回空数组 材料类型：prose_article。 难度规范（advanced）： - 优先高信息度表达：诹轊、抽象搭配细徫场架 - 在自然前提下通常每条 2-3 ?cloze。 - 拒绝低价值目标，?think if、this data or that data、泛化填充。 - 每条至少包含丝平庸多词盠。 10) For difficulty=advanced, include `phrase_types` with 1-2 labels chosen only from this taxonomy: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. 11) For difficulty=advanced, include `expression_transfer` as one short transfer hint (<=120 chars) focused on reusable discourse function; use an empty string when unclear. 12) Advanced expression is not the same as rare words; prioritize discourse-level, stance-level, and transfer-ready chunks. 13) If a segment contains both a common phrasal verb and a higher-value concession/discourse organizer, prefer the latter. chunk_text: {chunk_text}

cloze_transcript_intermediate.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will receive one or more chunks in this format: chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n Return a JSON array. Each item MUST include: { "chunk_id": "matching chunk id", "text": "cloze sentence(s)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers/html", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional hint" } Optional debug fields are allowed: - "selection_reason": short reason why this candidate is selected - "phrase_types": array of labels - "learning_value_score": numeric score - "expression_transfer": short transfer-oriented hint Global requirements: 1) text must contain at least one cloze: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint). 2) cN index increases by appearance order in each text. 3) original must not contain cloze markers or html. 4) use ... for emphasis, do NOT use markdown **. 5) omit candidates shorter than cloze_min_chars or exceeding cloze_max_sentences. 6) if no suitable candidate exists, return an empty array. Material profile: transcript_dialogue. Intermediate rubric: - Prefer idiomatic spoken collocations and discourse markers with transferable value. - Usually 1-2 clozes per candidate. - Preserve enough context to understand pragmatic intent. - Avoid over-fragmented snippets. - Include expression_transfer when reusable function is clear; keep it <=120 chars. chunk_text: {chunk_text}

cloze_transcript_advanced.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will receive one or more chunks in this format: chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n Return a JSON array. Each item MUST include: { "chunk_id": "matching chunk id", "text": "cloze sentence(s)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers/html", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional hint" } Optional debug fields are allowed: - "selection_reason": short reason why this candidate is selected - "phrase_types": array of labels - "learning_value_score": numeric score - "expression_transfer": short transfer-oriented hint Global requirements: 1) text must contain at least one cloze: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint). 2) cN index increases by appearance order in each text. 3) original must not contain cloze markers or html. 4) use ... for emphasis, do NOT use markdown **. 5) omit candidates shorter than cloze_min_chars or exceeding cloze_max_sentences. 6) if no suitable candidate exists, return an empty array. Material profile: transcript_dialogue. Advanced rubric: - Prefer nuanced conversational strategies, stance-shifting language, and high-transfer pragmatic chunks. - Usually 2-3 clozes per candidate only when still natural. - Reject low-value easy targets and filler-like fragments. - Keep context complete enough to preserve conversational force. 10) For difficulty=advanced, include `phrase_types` with 1-2 labels chosen only from this taxonomy: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. 11) For difficulty=advanced, include `expression_transfer` as one short transfer hint (<=120 chars) focused on reusable discourse function; use an empty string when unclear. 12) Advanced expression is not the same as rare words; prioritize discourse-level, stance-level, and transfer-ready chunks. 13) If a segment contains both a common phrasal verb and a higher-value concession/discourse organizer, prefer the latter. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
cloze_transcript_advanced.zh: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} 你将收到丈多个 chunk，格式下： chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n 请返?JSON 数组。每丅素必须包吼 { "chunk_id": "对应?chunk id", "text": "包含 cloze 的句子", "original": "不含 cloze 标?html 的纯文本", "target_phrases": ["1", "2"], "note_hint": "叉提示" } 允附加调试字： - "selection_reason": 该选中的简矐由 - "phrase_types": 标数组 - "learning_value_score": 数评分 全局要求： 1) text 必须至少包含?cloze：{{cN::}}(提示)。 2) 同一?text ?cN 按出现顺序。 3) original 不得包含 cloze 标?html。 4) 叻使用 ... 强调，不要使?markdown **。 5) 丢弃长度小于 cloze_min_chars 或句子数超过 cloze_max_sentences 的 6) 若没有合适内容，返回空数组 材料类型：transcript_dialogue。 难度规范（advanced）： - 优先细腻的会话策略立场转换和高迁移诔块 - 仅在臄时使?2-3 ?cloze。 - 拒绝低价值简单目标和 filler 风格碎片。 - 上下文足完整，能保留原诰力量。 10) For difficulty=advanced, include `phrase_types` with 1-2 labels chosen only from this taxonomy: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. 11) For difficulty=advanced, include `expression_transfer` as one short transfer hint (<=120 chars) focused on reusable discourse function; use an empty string when unclear. 12) Advanced expression is not the same as rare words; prioritize discourse-level, stance-level, and transfer-ready chunks. 13) If a segment contains both a common phrasal verb and a higher-value concession/discourse organizer, prefer the latter. chunk_text: {chunk_text}

cloze_prose_reading_support_beginner.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will receive one or more chunks in this format: chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n Return a JSON array. Each item MUST include: { "chunk_id": "matching chunk id", "text": "cloze sentence(s)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers/html", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional hint" } Optional debug fields are allowed: - "selection_reason": short reason why this candidate is selected - "phrase_types": array of labels - "learning_value_score": numeric score - "expression_transfer": short optional functional hint Global requirements: 1) text must contain at least one cloze: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint). 2) cN index increases by appearance order in each text. 3) original must not contain cloze markers or html. 4) use ... for emphasis, do NOT use markdown **. 5) keep reading support cards light: usually 1 cloze, max 2 clozes. 6) keep target_phrases focused: usually 1-2 key items. 7) prefer expressions that reduce reading friction: discourse moves, contrast, scope limits, reference links, abstraction bridges. 8) avoid over-mining or selecting obscure terms only because they are difficult. 9) expression_transfer is optional in reading_support; when present, keep it concise and function-focused. 10) phrase_types should be light-touch. If used, choose 1-2 labels from: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. 11) if no suitable candidate exists, return an empty array. Material profile: prose_article. Beginner reading-support rubric: - Keep cards easy to read and immediately understandable. - Usually 1 cloze per card. - Prefer practical connectors and high-frequency chunks that unlock local comprehension. chunk_text: {chunk_text}

Material profile: prose_article. Beginner reading-support rubric: - Keep cards easy to read and immediately understandable. - Usually 1 cloze per card. - Prefer practical connectors and high-frequency chunks that unlock local comprehension. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
